mechanism_narrative: A persistent downward trend in FEDFUNDS over the trailing 3 months lowers the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, mechanically raising present value of the S&P 500 and producing positive forward returns over the next 20 trading days regardless of level.
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS 3-month change and 20-day forward SPX returns is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or sign of correlation flips positive-to-negative persistently.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over a 3-month window from a low base near 3.6%, it signals an inflection in labor market slack that historically precedes earnings downgrades, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: In triggered instances, SPX 20-day forward returns are positive in more than 55% of cases, or the effect is not statistically distinguishable from unconditional base rate (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Joint deceleration in RSAFS (retail sales) and HOUST (housing starts) below their respective trailing 6-month trend simultaneously signals a broad-based consumer and investment demand slowdown that equity markets underprice, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days. Neither series alone is sufficient; the co-movement is the signal.
candidate_trigger: both RSAFS and HOUST fall below trailing 6-month moving average simultaneously
failure_condition: Joint-trigger episodes show 60-day forward returns statistically indistinguishable from unconditional distribution (p > 0.05), or single-series RSAFS-only signal performs equally well, negating the interaction claim.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle expansion characterized by low unemployment (UNRATE near cycle lows), continued positive month-over-month growth in INDPRO signals sustained industrial capacity utilization that supports corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days; this relationship is weaker or absent outside late-cycle regimes.
failure_condition: Rank IC of INDPRO momentum with 20-day forward returns is below 0.03 when UNRATE < 4%, or the effect is equally strong when UNRATE > 5%, contradicting the regime-conditional claim.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses above 4.5%, restrictive monetary policy raises the cost of capital and compresses valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as tightening effects propagate through credit and investment channels.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day forward returns in more than 55% of periods with FEDFUNDS > 4.5%, or Rank IC falls below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window in this regime.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month acceleration in PAYEMS reflects tightening labor demand and near-term consumer income growth, generating a short-lived positive momentum effect on S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days as markets react to payroll print surprises.
failure_condition: Rank IC between PAYEMS month-over-month change and 5-day forward SPX returns is below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in HOUST of more than 10% year-over-year occurring while FEDFUNDS is above 4%, indicating monetary tightening is actively suppressing rate-sensitive housing demand, is a leading indicator of broader economic slowdown, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Triggered episodes show 60-day forward returns positive in more than 55% of cases, or HOUST decline alone (without FEDFUNDS condition) predicts equally well, negating the interaction claim.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation exceeds FEDFUNDS (implying negative real policy rates), the resulting accommodative real financial conditions support equity risk-taking, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days; when real rates flip positive, the signal reverses.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL YoY inflation rate exceeds FEDFUNDS level (negative real rate)
failure_condition: 5-day forward SPX returns under negative real-rate conditions are not significantly different from positive real-rate conditions (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 2-year window.
